rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §46.012, which addresses charter school funding allotments. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school is not entitled to an allotment under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to charter school allotment eligibility, not property tax homestead exemptions.
